preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits for Time relay

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits for Time relay
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire pour 0
preferred_name_ml.zh: 定时继电器的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the time relay which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the time relay which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices du relais temporisé destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile eines Zeitrelais, die zu anderen Stromkreisen als dem Hauptstromkreis des Geräts gehören
definition_ml.zh: 在主电路之外的电路中使用的定时继电器的所有导电部件
